name: dynamic-workflows
description: Plan, run, resume, and audit local declarative workflows with codex exec or claude -p subagents.

interface.longDescription: Dynamic Workflows gives Codex a local workflow runner with approval gates, run snapshots, append-only events, resume, cancellation, structured worker results from codex exec or claude -p subagents, deterministic local tasks, and an optional MCP interface. It intentionally does not hook or replace the built-in /goal command.
defaultPrompt: Plan and run this task with Dynamic Workflows.
Show the status of a Dynamic Workflows run.
Resume a paused Dynamic Workflows run.
